hooks.command:
# Generated by asp hook install --client claude.
repo_root='/Users/guangtao/ghq/github.com/tao3k/agent-semantic-protocols'

activation="$repo_root/.cache/agent-semantic-protocol/hooks/activation.json"
config="$repo_root/.codex/agent-semantic-protocol/hooks/config.toml"
exec asp hook post-tool --client claude --activation "$activation" --config "$config"
